title: rnaseq-nf pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

fastq_1.errorMessage: FASTQ read 1 must be provided, cannot contain spaces, and must end with .fq, .fastq, .fq.gz, or .fastq.gz

fastq_2.errorMessage: FASTQ read 2 must be provided, cannot contain spaces, and must end with .fq, .fastq, .fq.gz, or .fastq.gz
